title: Crime Contract verification deadline approaches
body: "We notified all those who had tendered successfully in stage 1 of the crime procurement process on 13 December 2024. We advised that verification information must be provided by 31 January if they wish to join the duty rotas commencing on 1 October.  We reminded all those who have yet to provide their information that there are now less then two weeks to do so.  For full details of the procurement process please read the Application Guide which is available at Crime Contract 2025 Tender - GOV.UK "
